text.title: JavaScript/TypeScript Stack Practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for practices-js-ts-stack.

conclusion.verdict: type=module + exports map with import (and conditional require) entries
type=module; no exports map needed; pin Node engine
stage migration: convert imports module-by-module behind a feature flag; flip type=module last
add tsc --noEmit as a discrete CI step before build

text.example: shape=library_published_to_npm → type=module + exports map + flat ESLint + Vitest + CI typecheck step. Rule: esm-only.
